_comment: Auto-pinhole (#173) for deconz:bridge — the native Hue-compatible API that replaces HA emulated_hue. Consumed INTRA-zone by SysAP (both in iotCloud per ADR-COM-0006). Same capability name as hue:bridge -> interchangeable provider.

ports.description: deCONZ Hue-compat REST API (SysAP light/scene control) — intra-zone iotCloud
SSDP discovery — SysAP finds the Hue-emulated bridge intra-zone (iotCloud); no cross-zone relay
